findings.description: src/assistant/core/graph_client.py:_get_bytes_inner: Span retry_attempt attribute does not account for redirect_follows, leading to duplicate attempt indices in dashboards when both auth-refresh and redirects occur in a single logical operation.
findings.resolution: Update all span emissions in _get_bytes_inner to use retry_attempt=base_attempt + auth_refreshes + redirect_follows to ensure unique indices per HTTP hop.

findings.description: src/assistant/core/graph_client.py:_get_bytes_inner: Missing graph_call spans for transport-level failures (e.g., ReadTimeout) during streaming, causing a visibility gap compared to _send_with_auth_retry which correctly emits status_code=None spans for such errors.
findings.resolution: Wrap the streaming loop and initial request in a try/except block for httpx transport errors and emit a graph_call span with status_code=None and the appropriate error label before re-raising.

findings.description: src/assistant/core/graph_client.py:_get_bytes_inner: Transport errors (httpx subclasses) are not mapped to GraphAPIError, breaking consistency with the R6 remediation in _send_with_auth_retry and forcing callers (like SharePointExtension) to handle transport-specific exceptions instead of a unified API error type.
findings.resolution: Implement the same error_code_map and GraphAPIError wrapping in the exception handlers of _get_bytes_inner as used in _send_with_auth_retry.
